title: Hammer Mod
description: This mod adds 6 new hammers that can dig 3x3 mines.
body:
This mod will add 6 new items to your world that will help you in the mines! This mod adds hammers, tools that can dig 3x3x3 tunnels! To craft this hammer, you need to craft iron sticks from two iron ingots and add 6 pieces of wood/iron/gold/stone/diamonds to this stick, you can also upgrade the diamond hammer to netherite!

![iron sticks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e93c9a7048a7e9c9e277e3f4a45e2c1616ef92c.png)

![wood hammer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/945b3b56b57628bba461c42784b5a5a4635a073a.png)

![stone hammer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5dea305589634f670dd02ab116cf2be03aafff9a.png)

![iron hammer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/effd7a41885e8e8432d146e0de0ec2276f88023c.png)

![gold hammer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08ff7441d7062a56f8d0cbe3f2790598049eab2c.png)

![diamond hammer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a4fde624a3de2d384c5b234a4ce05146e75c1db.png)

![netherite hammer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b556bef4485117ceec9c03233778ef967aa30ecf.png)
